open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] fix: l_qsort buffer overflow for element sizes > 256 bytes
[Repo Assist] feat: add l_strtof (float32 string parsing)

notes: No human-authored issues. Two open Repo Assist PRs: qsort fix (re-applies PR #82 which maintainer closed believing it was on main — it wasn't) and strtof addition. PR #82 closed by maintainer. Previous PRs #76/#79/#80/#83 all merged. Next: buffered I/O helpers (l_fopen-style wrappers).
